title: Xtra Flaky British Potato Bake
description: A quick-fix British dish featuring panang curry paste, earthy flavors, and a flaky texture, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This macrobiotic-friendly recipe is baked on a slate-tile vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes, panang curry paste, olive oil, salt, and black pepper, and toss until the potatoes are evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, mix the chopped onion and minced garlic.

In a greased slate-tile vessel, create a layer of potatoes, followed by a layer of the onion and garlic mixture, and repeat this process until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of potatoes on top.
Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese over the top layer of potatoes.
Bake the potato bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
Remove the bake from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the Xtra Flaky British Potato Bake hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
